template:
module Main where
import Control.Exception (try, SomeException, evaluate)
import System.IO (hSetBuffering, stdout, BufferMode(NoBuffering))

myScanl :: (b -> a -> b) -> b -> [a] -> [b]
myScanl f acc xs = [[SLOT outer_fold]]
  where
    step x (y:ys) = acc : foldr (\a (b:bs) -> f b a : b : bs) [[SLOT step_init]] xs

-- Alternative elegant solution:
-- myScanl f acc xs = acc : foldr (\x ys@(y:_) -> f y x : ys) [] xs

-- Most direct solution:
myScanl' :: (b -> a -> b) -> b -> [a] -> [b]
myScanl' f acc = [[SLOT alt_pipeline]]
  where
    step x (ys, a) = [[SLOT step_let]]

main :: IO ()
main = kataMain

slots.name: step_let
slots.answer: let new = f a x in (new:ys, new)
decoys: let new = f x a in (new:ys, new)
(f a x : ys, f a x)
let new = f a x in (ys ++ [new], new)

prompt: Pick the outer fold, the initializer, the alt pipeline, and the let-step.
